validation.redactionBoundary: synthetic manual order permission hash helper validator fixtures only; no real hash helper implementation, private packet, raw account, raw operator, credential, provider payload, order payload, token, app key, app secret, execution, fill, confirmation, route, UI, DB migration, provider call, or order submission

outputRules: helper output must contain only deterministic labels and hash strings
helper output must not include raw operator names, account identifiers, session ids, provider payloads, or order payloads
helper output must not create or mutate data/private/trading/manual_order_permission.redacted.json
helper output must not unlock provider calls, runtime routes, UI, or order submission
